title: AURA NEXT Underwriting Decision
description: Schema for an automated underwriting decision returned by RGA's AURA NEXT platform API.

applicationId.description: Unique identifier for the insurance application.

decisionId.description: Unique identifier for this underwriting decision.

decisionDate.description: Timestamp when the underwriting decision was made.

tableRating.description: Table rating if applicable (percentage above standard mortality, in multiples of 25).

flatExtra.description: Flat extra premium per thousand if applicable.

exclusions.description: Any exclusions applied to the policy.

decisionReasons.description: Reasons contributing to the underwriting decision.

reasonCode.description: Coded reason for the decision factor.

reasonDescription.description: Human-readable description of this decision factor.

weight.description: Relative weight of this factor in the decision.

automatedDecision.description: Whether this decision was made fully automatically without human review.

referralQueue.description: If referred, the queue or team to which the case was referred.

policyDetails.description: Details about the policy being underwritten.

productType.description: Type of insurance product (e.g., 'Term Life', 'Universal Life', 'Whole Life').

faceAmount.description: Face amount of coverage requested in dollars.

issueAge.description: Age of the applicant at policy issue.

ruleSetVersion.description: Version of the underwriting rule set used to make this decision.

processingTimeMs.description: Time in milliseconds taken to produce the decision.
